title: rhamnus saxatilis subsp. saxatilis
intro: Rhamnus saxatilis subsp. saxatilis, also known as alder buckthorn or mountain alder buckthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, due to its high anthraquinone content. The health benefits of Rhamnus saxatilis subsp. saxatilis include its ability to act as a laxative, improve digestion, and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are often used to treat constipation and other gastrointestinal issues.
